mandarin_意义: 河南方言里常说的"你"，语气比普通话更亲近。
example_sentence: 恁今儿来得真早，俺也去给你买瓶水。
example_sentence_en: You came early today; I'll go buy you some water.
usage_note: 多见于河南口语对话，书面表达里通常换成"你"。

mandarin_意义: 河南方言里表示"别"，常用于劝阻。
example_sentence: 你白跟他犟了，先把正事办完再说。
example_sentence_en: Don't argue with him now; finish the important thing first.
usage_note: 语气直接，常放在动词前。

mandarin_意义: 河南方言里表示"行、可以"，用于认可。
搭配: 中不中；这法子中；中得很
example_sentence: 这个方案中，咱就按这个节奏推进。
example_sentence_en: This plan works; let's move forward with it.
usage_note: 常见问答式表达"中不中"。

mandarin_意义: 河南方言里常指"女儿"，也可亲昵称呼小姑娘。
example_sentence: 他一提起自家妞，脸上马上就带笑。
example_sentence_en: He smiles right away when he talks about his daughter.
usage_note: 带有地域色彩和亲昵感。

mandarin_意义: 河南方言里表示"怎么"，用于提问或反问。
example_sentence: 这都到节骨眼了，你咋还不出发？
example_sentence_en: It's already crunch time. Why haven't you left yet?
usage_note: 高频疑问词，口语感很强。

mandarin_意义: 靠长期练习形成的技术本领，常指做饭或手工能力。
example_sentence: 他靠一手好手艺在片场很快站稳脚跟。
example_sentence_en: He established himself on set with excellent skills.

mandarin_意义: 同一次妊娠出生的两个孩子。
搭配: 一对双胞胎；双胞胎姐妹
example_sentence: 剧里那对双胞胎一出场就把全场逗笑了。
example_sentence_en: The twins made everyone laugh as soon as they appeared.

mandarin_意义: 事情在重要性和紧迫性上的先后次序。
搭配: 分清轻重缓急；事情有轻重缓急
example_sentence: 排拍摄计划前，导演先把轻重缓急理了一遍。
example_sentence_en: Before scheduling shoots, the director sorted out priorities.

mandarin_意义: 懂道理、识大体，能体谅别人。
example_sentence: 她虽然年轻，但说话办事特别明事理。
example_sentence_en: She is young but very sensible in speech and action.
usage_note: 常用于评价性格与教养。

mandarin_意义: 四处游历，多带有随性漂泊的意味。
example_sentence: 他拍完这部戏就想一个人云游半年。
example_sentence_en: He wants to roam for half a year after finishing this film.

mandarin_意义: 两家因子女婚姻而形成的亲属关系。
example_sentence: 两位亲家第一次见面就聊得特别投机。
example_sentence_en: The two in-laws hit it off at their first meeting.

mandarin_意义: 长期忍受身心上的辛苦或压力。
example_sentence: 连续照顾病人一个月，真是太熬人了。
example_sentence_en: Caring for a patient for a month straight is exhausting.

mandarin_意义: 因为小事争辩，通常不算严重冲突。
example_sentence: 他们俩天天拌嘴，但转头又一起做饭。
example_sentence_en: They bicker every day but cook together right after.

mandarin_意义: 情绪长期低落、兴趣减退的心理状态。
example_sentence: 他最近总把自己关在屋里，像是有点抑郁。
example_sentence_en: He has been locking himself in his room lately, seeming depressed.
usage_note: 可作形容词，也可指状态。

mandarin_意义: 外界不了解、很少被公开提到。
搭配: 不为人知的秘密；不为人知的故事
example_sentence: 这位配角背后有一段不为人知的往事。
example_sentence_en: There is an unknown past behind this supporting role.

mandarin_意义: 因担心结果而持续不安。
example_sentence: 临近首映那几天，整个团队都很焦虑。
example_sentence_en: In the days before premiere, the whole team felt anxious.

mandarin_意义: 原本拥有的能力、机会或资格失去。
example_sentence: 他一味逃避，慢慢丧失了翻盘的机会。
example_sentence_en: By always avoiding things, he gradually lost his chance to turn around.

mandarin_意义: 因单位调整而失去原有岗位。
example_sentence: 父亲下岗后，一家人的生活压力一下就上来了。
example_sentence_en: After his father was laid off, family pressure rose sharply.

mandarin_意义: 因为看不上而疏远或挑剔。
搭配: 别嫌弃；嫌弃出身；嫌弃工作
example_sentence: 她嘴上说不在意，其实一直在嫌弃他的收入。
example_sentence_en: She says she doesn't care, but she keeps looking down on his income.

mandarin_意义: 待人时摆出的傲慢姿态。
example_sentence: 成名以后他反而没架子，大家更愿意合作。
example_sentence_en: After becoming famous, he stayed humble and easier to work with.

mandarin_意义: 细致照料他人起居或情绪。
example_sentence: 她一边上班一边伺候老人，真的不容易。
example_sentence_en: She works while taking care of elders, which is really hard.

mandarin_意义: 性子倔，不轻易听劝。
example_sentence: 这孩子太犟，认准了就谁劝都不听。
example_sentence_en: This kid is so stubborn and listens to no one once decided.

pinyin: héng tiāo bízi shù tiāo yǎn
mandarin_意义: 对人处处挑毛病，怎么看都不顺眼。
example_sentence: 她婆婆一来就横挑鼻子竖挑眼，气氛特别紧张。
example_sentence_en: Her mother-in-law nitpicked everything, making the atmosphere tense.

mandarin_意义: 故意在本无问题的地方找茬。
英文意义: find fault where there is none
example_sentence: 方案已经很完整了，你别再鸡蛋里面挑骨头。
example_sentence_en: The plan is already complete; stop finding faults in nothing.

mandarin_意义: 花钱过分计较，舍不得支出。
example_sentence: 他请客还要AA，朋友都说他太抠了。
example_sentence_en: He still split the bill when hosting; friends call him stingy.

mandarin_意义: 反复折返地做，让人身心疲惫。
example_sentence: 为了一个镜头来回折腾到凌晨，大家都快散架了。
example_sentence_en: Everyone was worn out after redoing one shot until midnight.

mandarin_意义: 说话做事不过多顾虑，显得大大咧咧。
example_sentence: 她表面没心没肺，其实心里什么都记得。
example_sentence_en: She seems carefree, but she remembers everything inside.

mandarin_意义: 为达成目标不惜拿出全部家底。
example_sentence: 为了给孩子看病，他们真是砸锅卖铁了。
example_sentence_en: They really sold everything they had to treat their child.

mandarin_意义: 排名处在最后位置。
example_sentence: 这个季度他业绩垫底，被主管单独谈话了。
example_sentence_en: He ranked last this quarter and was talked to by his manager.

mandarin_意义: 间隔很短、发生频繁。
搭配: 三天两头来；三天两头请假
example_sentence: 他三天两头改需求，团队都快被拖垮了。
example_sentence_en: He changes requirements every few days, draining the team.

mandarin_意义: 未被明确意识到却影响判断的心理活动。
搭配: 潜意识里；受潜意识影响
example_sentence: 她潜意识里一直害怕失败，所以迟迟不敢开机。
example_sentence_en: She subconsciously fears failure, so she dares not start.

mandarin_意义: 此处多指以道德名义强迫他人接受要求。
example_sentence: 你可以提建议，但别用家人去绑架他的选择。
example_sentence_en: You can advise, but don't morally coerce his choice with family.

mandarin_意义: 行事收敛低调，不敢张扬。
example_sentence: 吃过一次大亏后，他开始夹着尾巴做人。
example_sentence_en: After a major setback, he began keeping a low profile.

mandarin_意义: 遇事畏缩，不敢担当。
example_sentence: 关键时刻退缩，只会让人觉得你懦弱。
example_sentence_en: Backing off at critical moments only makes you look weak.

mandarin_意义: 主动丢下或舍弃原有的人和事。
example_sentence: 他害怕再次被抛弃，所以总是先推开别人。
example_sentence_en: He fears being abandoned again, so he pushes others away first.

mandarin_意义: 最关键、最紧要的时刻。
搭配: 在节骨眼上；关键节骨眼
example_sentence: 都到节骨眼上了，谁也不能掉链子。
example_sentence_en: At this critical moment, no one can mess up.

mandarin_意义: 从整体和长期看问题的能力。
example_sentence: 做管理的人必须有大局观，不能只盯眼前。
example_sentence_en: Managers must have a big-picture view, not just short-term focus.
usage_note: 多用于职场与团队协作。

mandarin_意义: 在新环境中建立稳定位置和能力。
example_sentence: 他在这个圈子熬了三年才算站稳脚跟。
example_sentence_en: He endured three years before gaining a foothold in the field.

mandarin_意义: 形容非常辛苦地替人卖力。
英文意义: work like a beast of burden
example_sentence: 他这些年一直给公司当牛做马，几乎没休过假。
example_sentence_en: He has worked like a beast for the company for years with little rest.

mandarin_意义: 突然冒出来的麻烦或馊主意。
example_sentence: 项目都快收尾了，他又整出个幺蛾子。
example_sentence_en: The project was almost done and he caused trouble again.

mandarin_意义: 停下来，不再闹腾折腾。
example_sentence: 这事儿闹了一周，今天总算消停了。
example_sentence_en: This mess lasted a week and finally calmed down today.

mandarin_意义: 自己不做事却对别人随便指挥评论。
example_sentence: 你要么上手帮忙，要么别在旁边指手画脚。
example_sentence_en: Either help out or stop bossing people around.

mandarin_意义: 在背后命令或唆使别人去做事。
example_sentence: 警方怀疑他是受人指使才这么做的。
example_sentence_en: Police suspect he acted under someone's instigation.

mandarin_意义: 比喻世界的分寸和复杂，不知轻重时常用。
example_sentence: 刚入行就敢硬刚前辈，真有点不知天高地厚。
example_sentence_en: He challenged seniors as a newbie, not knowing his limits.
usage_note: 常见固定说法"不知天高地厚"。

mandarin_意义: 让别人因自己承受额外负担。
example_sentence: 他最怕自己一旦倒下会拖累整个剧组。
example_sentence_en: He fears collapsing and burdening the whole crew.

mandarin_意义: 突然结束关系，或快速丢开某人。
example_sentence: 他一句解释都没有就把女友甩了。
example_sentence_en: He dumped his girlfriend without any explanation.

mandarin_意义: 拼尽体力精力去做事。
example_sentence: 为了赶档期，整个团队都在卖命干活。
example_sentence_en: The whole team is working their guts out to meet schedule.

mandarin_意义: 分开的人重新聚在一起。
example_sentence: 忙了一年，大家终于在年夜饭上团聚。
example_sentence_en: After a year of work, everyone reunited at New Year's dinner.

mandarin_意义: 分辨酸甜苦辣等味道的感觉能力。
example_sentence: 感冒后他几天都尝不出味道，味觉明显变差。
example_sentence_en: After a cold, he could barely taste anything for days.

mandarin_意义: 能力或机能比以前下降。
example_sentence: 长期不练台词，表达能力会慢慢退化。
example_sentence_en: Without practicing lines, expressive ability deteriorates.

mandarin_意义: 故事里施法害人的老妇形象，也可骂人。
example_sentence: 她一生气就被孩子吐槽像个巫婆。
example_sentence_en: When angry, kids tease her as a witch.

mandarin_意义: 乱到难以收拾、毫无条理。
搭配: 乱成一团糟；工作一团糟
example_sentence: 临开拍前道具全错了，现场一团糟。
example_sentence_en: Props were all wrong before shooting, and set was a mess.

mandarin_意义: 看着舒服、让人不反感。
example_sentence: 这套造型第一眼一般，越看越顺眼。
example_sentence_en: This styling seemed average first, then grew on me.
usage_note: 多用于外观和人际印象。

mandarin_意义: 长期共同生活、相互扶持的对象。
example_sentence: 他希望找一个能并肩打拼的伴侣。
example_sentence_en: He hopes to find a partner to strive alongside.

mandarin_意义: 样子狼狈，也指受挫后很没面子。
example_sentence: 第一次创业失败后，他灰头土脸地回了老家。
example_sentence_en: After his first startup failed, he returned home in embarrassment.

mandarin_意义: 通过法院处理的法律纠纷案件。
example_sentence: 合同没写清楚，最后双方只能去打官司。
example_sentence_en: With unclear contract terms, both sides ended in court.

mandarin_意义: 女儿长大后有自己的生活，父母难久留。
英文意义: grown daughters cannot be kept at home
example_sentence: 母亲嘴上说女大不中留，眼里还是满是舍不得。
example_sentence_en: Her mother says daughters can't be kept, but looks reluctant.

mandarin_意义: 非常希望某事立刻发生。
搭配: 巴不得早点；巴不得现在
example_sentence: 他巴不得今天就把误会说开。
example_sentence_en: He can't wait to clear up the misunderstanding today.

mandarin_意义: 讽刺人说不出好话。
英文意义: a foul mouth can't say nice things
example_sentence: 他又阴阳怪气，真是狗嘴吐不出象牙。
example_sentence_en: He's sarcastic again; he never says anything nice.
usage_note: 带明显情绪，不宜正式场合。

mandarin_意义: 发自内心、只对亲近的人说的话。
example_sentence: 凌晨收工后，两个人终于坐下说了会儿知心话。
example_sentence_en: After wrapping at dawn, they finally had a heart-to-heart.

mandarin_意义: 按自己性子来，不顾后果或他人感受。
example_sentence: 他这次任性辞职，把家里人都急坏了。
example_sentence_en: He quit impulsively and worried his family.

mandarin_意义: 标准过高、对细节过分苛求。
example_sentence: 导演对台词节奏特别挑剔，反复重拍。
example_sentence_en: The director is picky about line rhythm and keeps reshooting.

mandarin_意义: 别人难以替代的拿手本领。
example_sentence: 他现场来了一段绝活，瞬间把气氛点燃。
example_sentence_en: He showed a special skill and lit up the room instantly.

mandarin_意义: 旧俗中女子借抛绣球择偶，也可比喻公开选人。
英文意义: throw a silk ball to choose spouse
example_sentence: 节目组把岗位公开出来，像在抛绣球选人。
example_sentence_en: The show opened the role publicly, like throwing a silk ball.

mandarin_意义: 别人说话时贸然打断。
example_sentence: 长辈谈正事时他一直插嘴，场面很尴尬。
example_sentence_en: He kept interrupting elders, making things awkward.

mandarin_意义: 独自一人面对困难，不借外援。
example_sentence: 她单枪匹马去谈合作，最后真把合同签下来了。
example_sentence_en: She negotiated alone and still sealed the deal.

mandarin_意义: 关节从正常位置错开。
example_sentence: 动作戏失手后他肩膀脱臼，立刻送医。
example_sentence_en: He dislocated his shoulder during an action scene and was rushed to hospital.

mandarin_意义: 现在下结论还太早。
example_sentence: 项目才起步就谈成功，未免言之过早。
example_sentence_en: Talking success at project start is too early.

mandarin_意义: 处在行业最前列、水平极高。
example_sentence: 这位摄影师在业内一直是顶尖水平。
example_sentence_en: This cinematographer has always been top-tier.

mandarin_意义: 没有需要顾虑的人和事，心里轻松。
example_sentence: 孩子都独立了，他终于能无牵无挂去旅行。
example_sentence_en: With kids independent, he can finally travel carefree.

mandarin_意义: 心理或系统突然失去承受能力。
example_sentence: 连续加班三周后，她在会议室当场崩溃。
example_sentence_en: After three weeks of overtime, she broke down in the meeting room.
usage_note: 可用于人也可用于系统。

mandarin_意义: 心神不宁，注意力无法集中。
example_sentence: 他这几天一直魂不守舍，台词老记错。
example_sentence_en: He has been absent-minded these days and keeps forgetting lines.

mandarin_意义: 不合适，不够稳妥。
example_sentence: 你当众这么说有些不妥，私下聊更好。
example_sentence_en: Saying that publicly is inappropriate; private talk is better.

mandarin_意义: 为别人或事情反复费神担忧。
example_sentence: 你都成年了，别再让父母这么操心。
example_sentence_en: You're an adult now; stop making your parents worry.

mandarin_意义: 痛苦到觉得活着比死还难受。
example_sentence: 那段时间压力大到他觉得生不如死。
example_sentence_en: During that time, pressure felt worse than death.

mandarin_意义: 用尖锐方式挖苦或揭露不合理现象。
example_sentence: 这段台词看似玩笑，其实在讽刺职场潜规则。
example_sentence_en: The line sounds like a joke but satirizes workplace rules.

mandarin_意义: 不处理责任，直接离开。
example_sentence: 合同签完就一走了之，这种做法太不负责。
example_sentence_en: He walked away right after signing; that's irresponsible.

mandarin_意义: 超出常理，令人难以相信。
example_sentence: 他三个月练成这个难度，简直不可思议。
example_sentence_en: He mastered this in three months, unbelievable.

mandarin_意义: 插手别人的决定或事务。
example_sentence: 这是我的职业选择，请别再干涉。
example_sentence_en: This is my career choice; please stop interfering.

mandarin_意义: 在工作中有管理职责的直接领导。
example_sentence: 他跟上司沟通得顺，项目推进就快。
example_sentence_en: He communicates smoothly with his boss, so project moves fast.

mandarin_意义: 没有逻辑、明显不合理。
example_sentence: 把全部责任都推给新人，这说法太荒谬了。
example_sentence_en: Blaming everything on a newcomer is absurd.

mandarin_意义: 言行过分甜腻，让人不自在。
example_sentence: 他当众读情书，读得大家都觉得肉麻。
example_sentence_en: He read a love letter in public and made everyone cringe.

mandarin_意义: 言行超过分寸，造成不适。
example_sentence: 你刚才那个玩笑有点过火，伤到人了。
example_sentence_en: That joke went too far and hurt someone.

mandarin_意义: 亲自到场指挥把控局面。
example_sentence: 首映当天总制片人亲自坐镇，流程很稳。
example_sentence_en: The producer oversaw the premiere in person, keeping things smooth.

mandarin_意义: 让人费神、难处理。
example_sentence: 预算又被砍，这事儿最伤脑筋。
example_sentence_en: The budget was cut again; that's the biggest headache.

mandarin_意义: 长辈不必过度干预晚辈人生，顺其自然。
example_sentence: 老人劝她别太操心，儿孙自有儿孙福。
example_sentence_en: The elder told her not to worry too much; children have their own fate.

mandarin_意义: 关系亲近到像同一家人。
example_sentence: 这帮老同学多年不见，见面还是亲如一家。
example_sentence_en: These old classmates are still as close as family.

mandarin_意义: 因自己的事让他人受牵连。
example_sentence: 他宁可自己扛，也不愿连累朋友。
example_sentence_en: He'd rather shoulder it alone than implicate friends.

mandarin_意义: 暂时忍让自己，以保全整体关系或结果。
example_sentence: 为了团队不散，她选择先委曲求全。
example_sentence_en: To keep the team together, she chose to compromise for now.

mandarin_意义: 在背后议论挑刺，带评判意味。
example_sentence: 别人爱指指点点，你把活干好就行。
example_sentence_en: People may point fingers; just do your work well.
